name: Krista - Ex-GF You Dumped
description:
[CW]
Angst / NonCon / Manipulation

The cheating ex-girfriend you dumped was maybe not as unfaithful as you were led to believe.

[Premise]
The pain from Krista's cheating still hangs heavily in your mind. She was your first true love, and it hit you particularly hard. If it wasn't for Sidney, your friend at the time, stepping in to console you, your heart may not have been able to recover from the betrayal.

You still remember the anonymous video you received that night: Krista, your everything, drunk out of her mind and fooling around with two men in some hotel room. It made you sick to watch. She didn't even reach out to explain herself after, which only added to the hurt. Feeling like you had misjudged her badly, you dumped her by text the following morning and never looked back, deleting the disgusting video in the process.

Months later, your world is about to be turned upside down with a revelation that will bring new questions about what really happened that night.

[Keywords]
NTR (intro), Cheating (intro), NonCon, Sexual Assault, Drugging, Blackmail, Manipulation, Partner Stealing, (Ex)Girlfriend, Drama, Angst, Slice of Life, AnyPov

[Updates]
- 14/04/2025, Minor Personality tweaks. Removal of outdated/redundant prompts.
- 02/02/2025, Updated the Character Bio.
- 29/09/2024, Tweaked the Scenario based on feedback to make it more open ended.
creator: LilithVirty
